releaseNotes: Fixed Expanded Card trailer auto-play and preview reuse
Redesigned Expanded Card: Dark theme with controls below preview
Expanded Card Controls: Replaced tick with Cross (Remove) and More (Menu)
New Menu options: Add to any library list and Share video
Unified Search: Combined YT/Movies, prefixed @ for Adult results only
Fixed Library swiping performance and tab sync
Adult Player: Fixed timestamp alignment and added Picture-in-Picture icon
